rule.name: Sinatra Development/Debug Mode Enabled
rule.rule_desc: Detects development/debug settings in deployable Ruby app configs.
rule.vuln_desc: Development settings can leak detailed error diagnostics.
rule.developer: Harden production. rb and deployment env settings.
rule.reviewer: Validate production environment configuration separation. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Sinatra Unsafe Deserialization
rule.vuln_desc: Unsafe deserialization of untrusted payloads can lead to code execution.
rule.developer: Use safe loaders and trusted serialization boundaries.
rule.reviewer: Review user input flow to deserialization APIs. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Sinatra SQL Injection Sink
rule.rule_desc: Detects raw/dynamic SQL construction patterns in Ruby frameworks.
rule.vuln_desc: Dynamic query strings may be vulnerable to injection.
rule.reviewer: Check tainted values reaching SQL strings. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Sinatra Permissive CORS
rule.vuln_desc: Permissive CORS may expose sensitive API endpoints.
rule.reviewer: Validate rack-cors and proxy header configs. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Sinatra Hardcoded Secret Material
rule.vuln_desc: Hardcoded credentials can be leaked and abused.
rule.developer: Store secrets outside source and rotate regularly.
rule.reviewer: Review secrets management and commit history exposure. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.
